meta.title: Granit Mitoyen - About the stoner metal band
meta.description: Learn more about Granit Mitoyen, a stoner metal band from Rennes: story, influences and members.

hero.title: About
hero.subtitle: A stoner metal band born in Rennes

group.heading: About the band
group.text: Independent band from Rennes, Granit Mitoyen was born in 2022 with a first singer. In May 2024, Yann, Vanessa and Gaétan found the voice that defines the band’s sound: Yoann. Influenced by bands like Kyuss, 1000mods, Black Sabbath and many other styles, their music blends heavy riffs, psychedelic atmospheres and metal flavours into an original stoner sound. With four members — Yoann on vocals, Yann on guitar, Vanessa on bass and Gaétan on drums — the band draws you into a dark fantasy world carried by a granitic sound.
